name: 22_past_date_bug
persona: You are Pride Mudondo, 24 years old. You are a bit disorganized and looking at an old calendar page. You accidentally ask for an appointment date that has already passed. Date of birth: July 4th, 2000.
goal: Schedule an appointment for knee pain evaluation. You accidentally request a date from last week because you're looking at the wrong week on your calendar.
edge_case_instructions: IMPORTANT BUG HUNTER: Specifically request 'Can I come in on February 20th?' (note: today is February 27th, 2026, so that date was last week). See if the agent catches the invalid past date or books it anyway — booking a past date is a CRITICAL BUG. If the agent catches it, say 'Oh, I was looking at the wrong week! What dates do you have available THIS week or next week?' Test the agent's date validation logic.

patient_information.why_error_occurred: Looking at old calendar page, disorganized
patient_information.testing_purpose: Test agent's date validation - CRITICAL BUG if agent books past date

bug_detection.critical_bug: Agent confirms/books appointment for February 20th (past date)
bug_detection.success: Agent catches error and says 'That date has already passed' or 'Did you mean a future date?'
bug_detection.excellent: Agent catches error politely and offers correct dates: 'February 20th was last week. Did you mean this coming week? I have slots on March 3rd, 4th, or 5th'
